import os
import re
from pathlib import Path

# Scan the src directory structure
src_path = Path("/mnt/kimi/upload/src")

if not src_path.exists():
    print("src folder not found at /mnt/kimi/upload/src")
    # Try to find it
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk("/mnt/kimi/upload"):
        if "src" in dirs:
            print(f"Found src at: {os.path.join(root, 'src')}")
            src_path = Path(os.path.join(root, "src"))
            break
else:
    print(f"Found src at: {src_path}")

# Get all files
all_files = []
qt_files = []
header_files = []
cpp_files = []
asm_files = []

for root, dirs, files in os.walk(src_path):
    for file in files:
        filepath = os.path.join(root, file)
        rel_path = os.path.relpath(filepath, src_path)
        all_files.append(rel_path)
        
        if file.endswith('.h') or file.endswith('.hpp'):
            header_files.append(rel_path)
        elif file.endswith('.cpp') or file.endswith('.cc'):
            cpp_files.append(rel_path)
        elif file.endswith('.asm'):
            asm_files.append(rel_path)
        
        # Check for Qt includes
        if file.endswith(('.h', '.hpp', '.cpp', '.cc')):
            try:
                with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') as f:
                    content = f.read()
                    if any(qt in content for qt in ['#include <Q', '#include "Q', 'QT_', 'QObject', 'QWidget']):
                        qt_files.append(rel_path)
            except:
                pass

print(f"\n=== SOURCE ANALYSIS ===")
print(f"Total files: {len(all_files)}")
print(f"Header files: {len(header_files)}")
print(f"C++ files: {len(cpp_files)}")
print(f"ASM files: {len(asm_files)}")
print(f"Files with Qt deps: {len(qt_files)}")

print(f"\n=== QT FILES ({len(qt_files)}) ===")
for f in sorted(qt_files)[:30]:  # Show first 30
    print(f"  {f}")
if len(qt_files) > 30:
    print(f"  ... and {len(qt_files) - 30} more")

upload_path = Path("/mnt/kimi/upload")
all_code_files = []

# Group by extension

by_ext = defaultdict(list)
for f in all_code_files:
    ext = os.path.splitext(f)[1]
    by_ext[ext].append(f)

for ext in sorted(by_ext.keys()):
    files = by_ext[ext]
    print(f"\n{ext.upper()} files ({len(files)}):")

// RawrXD_SignalSlot.h - Replace QObject::connect
template<typename... Args>
class Signal {
    std::vector<std::function<void(Args...)>> slots;
public:
    void connect(std::function<void(Args...)> slot) {
        slots.push_back(slot);
    }
    void emit(Args... args) {
        for(auto& slot : slots) slot(args...);
    }
    void disconnect_all() { slots.clear(); }
};

#define CONNECT(sender, signal, receiver, slot) \
    (sender)->signal.connect(std::bind(&slot, receiver, std::placeholders::_1))

// RawrXD_SignalSlot.h - Replace QObject::connect
template<typename... Args>
class Signal {
    std::vector<std::function<void(Args...)>> slots;
public:
    void connect(std::function<void(Args...)> slot) {
        slots.push_back(slot);
    }
    void emit(Args... args) {
        for(auto& slot : slots) slot(args...);
    }
    void disconnect_all() { slots.clear(); }
};

// UTF-8 <-> UTF-16 conversion helpers
inline std::wstring Utf8ToWide(const char* utf8, int len = -1) {
    if (!utf8) return {};
    if (len < 0) len = (int)strlen(utf8);
    if (len == 0) return {};
    int wlen = MultiByteToWideChar(CP_UTF8, 0, utf8, len, nullptr, 0);
    std::wstring result(wlen, 0);
    MultiByteToWideChar(CP_UTF8, 0, utf8, len, result.data(), wlen);
    return result;
}

inline std::string WideToUtf8(const wchar_t* wide, int len = -1) {
    if (!wide) return {};
    if (len < 0) len = (int)wcslen(wide);
    if (len == 0) return {};
    int ulen = WideCharToMultiByte(CP_UTF8, 0, wide, len, nullptr, 0, nullptr, nullptr);
    std::string result(ulen, 0);
    WideCharToMultiByte(CP_UTF8, 0, wide, len, result.data(), ulen, nullptr, nullptr);
    return result;
}

// QString replacement
class String {
    std::wstring data;
    
public:
    String() = default;
    String(const wchar_t* s) : data(s ? s : L"") {}
    String(const std::wstring& s) : data(s) {}
    String(const char* utf8) : data(Utf8ToWide(utf8)) {}
    String(const std::string& utf8) : data(Utf8ToWide(utf8.c_str(), (int)utf8.length())) {}
    
    const wchar_t* c_str() const { return data.c_str(); }
    const std::wstring& toStdWString() const { return data; }
    std::string toUtf8() const { return WideToUtf8(data.c_str(), (int)data.length()); }
    
    bool isEmpty() const { return data.empty(); }
    int length() const { return (int)data.length(); }
    int size() const { return (int)data.size(); }
    
    wchar_t at(int i) const { return data.at(i); }
    wchar_t operator[](int i) const { return data[i]; }
    
    String mid(int pos, int len = -1) const {
        if (pos < 0) pos = 0;
        if (pos >= (int)data.length()) return {};
        if (len < 0 || pos + len > (int)data.length()) len = (int)data.length() - pos;
        return String(data.substr(pos, len));
    }
    
    String left(int n) const { return mid(0, n); }
    String right(int n) const { return n >= (int)data.length() ? *this : mid((int)data.length() - n); }
    
    int indexOf(const String& s, int from = 0) const {
        if (from < 0) from = 0;
        auto pos = data.find(s.data, from);

# Verify no Qt dependencies remain
$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

Write-Host "=== RAWRXD Qt-Free Verification ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan

$errors = 0

    Select-String -Pattern '#include\s*[<"](Q[^>"]+|qt[^>"]*|Qt)[>"]' -CaseSensitive
if ($qtIncludes) {
    Write-Host "FAIL: Qt includes found:" -ForegroundColor Red
    $qtIncludes | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.FileName):$($_.LineNumber)" }
    $errors++
} else {
    Write-Host "PASS: No Qt includes" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# Check 2: No Qt macros
$qtMacros = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Include *.h,*.hpp,*.cpp,*.cc $srcDir | 
    Select-String -Pattern 'Q_OBJECT|Q_PROPERTY|Q_SIGNAL|Q_SLOT|Q_DECLARE|QT_' -CaseSensitive
if ($qtMacros) {
    Write-Host "FAIL: Qt macros found:" -ForegroundColor Red
    $qtMacros | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.FileName):$($_.LineNumber)" }
    $errors++
} else {
    Write-Host "PASS: No Qt macros" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# Check 3: No Qt types
$qtTypes = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Include *.h,*.hpp,*.cpp,*.cc $srcDir | 
    Select-String -Pattern '\bQ(String|ByteArray|Variant|List|Vector|Map|Set|Point|Size|Rect|Color|Font|Image|Pixmap|Icon|Widget|Window|Dialog|MainWindow|Application|Timer|Thread|Mutex|File|Dir|IODevice|Buffer|Debug|TextStream|Json|Url|Network|Http|Tcp|Udp)\b' -CaseSensitive
if ($qtTypes) {
    Write-Host "FAIL: Qt types found:" -ForegroundColor Red
    $qtTypes | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $($_.FileName):$($_.LineNumber)" }
    $errors++
} else {
    Write-Host "PASS: No Qt types" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# Check 4: No moc files
if (Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Include moc_*.cpp,ui_*.h,qrc_*.cpp $srcDir -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) {
    Write-Host "FAIL: Generated Qt files found" -ForegroundColor Red
    $errors++
} else {
    Write-Host "PASS: No generated Qt files" -ForegroundColor Green
}

# Check 5: Build succeeds
Write-Host "`nBuilding..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
& cmake --build build --config Release 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath build.log | Out-Null
if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) {
    Write-Host "PASS: Build succeeded" -ForegroundColor Green
} else {
    Write-Host "FAIL: Build failed (see build.log)" -ForegroundColor Red
    $errors++
}

# Check 6: No Qt DLLs in output
$exe = "build/Release/RawrXD.exe"
if (Test-Path $exe) {
    $imports = dumpbin /imports $exe | Select-String -Pattern 'Qt6|qt-'
    if ($imports) {
        Write-Host "FAIL: Qt DLL imports found:" -ForegroundColor Red
        $imports | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $_" }
        $errors++
    } else {
        Write-Host "PASS: No Qt DLL imports" -ForegroundColor Green
    }
    
    $size = (Get-Item $exe).Length / 1MB
    Write-Host "INFO: Binary size: $([math]::Round($size,2)) MB" -ForegroundColor Cyan
    if ($size -gt 10) {
        Write-Host "WARN: Binary > 10MB, consider optimization" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    }
} else {
    Write-Host "FAIL: Executable not found" -ForegroundColor Red
    $errors++
}

Write-Host "`n=== RESULT ===" -ForegroundColor Cyan
if ($errors -eq 0) {
    Write-Host "ALL CHECKS PASSED - Qt successfully removed!" -ForegroundColor Green
    exit 0
} else {
    Write-Host "$errors check(s) failed" -ForegroundColor Red
    exit 1
}
